FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Eurozone Weakness Fuels USD Strength
tldr_points: Eurozone PMI contraction (47.4 vs 49.8) signals EUR weakness, supporting USD/JPY upside
Gold under pressure amid US-Iran stalemate reinforces risk-off USD bid
Technical setup favors buying on approach to key moving average support
FX.excerpt: EUR weakness from PMI miss creates tactical USD/JPY long opportunity at MA support
FX.comment: Tactical long on MA20 support with Eurozone PMI weakness driving USD strength

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Geopolitical Risk Resurfaces as Oil Surge Threatens Equity Momentum
tldr_points: Iran tensions drive oil above $100, pressuring risk assets
Record-breaking rally halted as futures dive on geopolitical escalation
Technical support levels under pressure as momentum shifts
STOCKS.excerpt: Geopolitical tailwinds reverse equity rally; oil surge creates headwinds for S&P 500.
STOCKS.comment: Geopolitical risk and oil surge create unfavorable risk-reward for long positions

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Capital Inflows Offset Regulatory Headwinds
tldr_points: Blockchain Capital's $700M fund raise signals sustained institutional demand
Uzbekistan mining tax holiday reinforces supply-side bullish thesis
Regulatory enforcement on political betting and rug pulls creates short-term sentiment risk
CRYPTO.excerpt: Institutional inflows outweigh regulatory noise; tactical long setup on support test.
CRYPTO.comment: Institutional inflows and support-level pullback create favorable risk-reward for long exposure
